task: Verify the phase 5.9 area-law metric in THOUGHT/LAB/CAT_CAS/7_decoder/50_phase_bm_cpu/phase5_9/ against the reports; note any gaps.
acceptance_criteria: Every phase 5.9 artifact cross-checked; gaps listed or none found.
_comment_completion: marker (default): worker emits GOAL_COMPLETE/GOAL_BLOCKED. Use completion_mode=judge for an external judge (deepseek-v4-flash); judge-unavailable fails fast, not silent.
_comment_lane: Default runs on the PERSISTENT reasoning lane (/v1/responses named conversation = canonical memory). Set execution_required=true to run code/tests on the /v1/runs execution lane; the result is summarized back into the persistent conversation.
_comment_verify: Optional deterministic gate. Use a PATH-resolved 'python'/'pytest' (NOT a full path) so a space in the repo path does not break the shell.
_comment_manager: Set judgment_mode=manager to pause on completion (awaiting_judgment) for the dispatcher to accept/reject via POST /workers/{id}/judge.
_comment_audit: Postflight scope audit (observe/revert AFTER the turn, not a pre-write block). auto_revert=true reverts ONLY agent-reported files outside write scope.
